subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth, and therein is that which gladdeneth the hearts of them who have turned unto His countenance and soared in the atmosphere of their Lord's love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق و فیه ما تفرح به افئده الذین اقبلوا الی الوجه و طاروا فی هوآء محبه ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love of God
